title: Baked Epoisses Gratin
description: A rich and creamy Dutch-style baked Epoisses cheese gratin, perfect for a decadent dinner. Serve with crusty bread for a comforting meal.
instructions: Butter the gratin dish and set aside.
In a medium saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the flour and whisk to combine. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
Slowly pour in the heavy cream, whisking continuously.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until thickened.
Remove from heat and stir in the Epoisses cheese until melted and smooth.
Season with salt and stir in the thyme.
Pour the cheese mixture into the prepared gratin dish.
Top with breadcrumbs and bake for 20-25 minutes, until golden brown.
